---
title: "Welcome to My Website"
subtitle: "Alina Schall | M.Sc. Statistical Sciences, Bielefeld University"
output: html_document
toc: false
format:
  html:
    css: styles.css

#image: 
about: 
 template: marquee
 image-shape: rounded
---

## About Me

Hi there! I'm Alina, a passionate researcher, R programmer, and lifelong learner. Here you'll find information about my background, skills, and education. Whether you're a potential employer, colleague, or collaborator, I'm excited to share my journey with you.

## Dive into My R Projects

Explore my portfolio of R projects.

## Connect with Me

Interested in collaborating on a project or discussing data science topics? Connect with me via email at alina.schall\@uni-bielefeld.de
